aggressive-momentum.description: Fast-acting agent for intraday momentum plays. Takes trades quickly, uses wider stops, and aims for larger gains. Prioritises speed of execution — chases entries with a price buffer when necessary.

conservative-swing.description: Patient agent for multi-day swing trades. Waits for high-confidence setups, uses tighter stops, and scales in/out over days. Overnight positions are expected — they skip EOD auto-close.

balanced-intraday.description: Balanced approach for intraday options. Moderate position sizes, requires pattern + model alignment before entry. Closes all positions by end of day unless explicitly marked swing.

detection._comment: Default character when no other heuristic matches
